get.description: Returns all geofence definitions for the operations dashboard.

get.description: Returns all sales regions for assignment and reporting.

post.description: Creates a region. Slug is generated from `name` if omitted (unique suffix added on collision). User.regionId must match a region id (cuid), not the slug.

get.description: Returns subwholesale nodes under regions, optionally filtered by region id.

200.description: List of subwholesales with region summary

post.description: Creates a subwholesale under a region. Slug is unique per region.

409.description: Slug already in use in this region

patch.description: Partial update including optional move to another region.

409.description: Slug already in use in target region

get.description: Returns all outlets with distributor, area and contact details.

post.description: Adds a new outlet with category, distributor link and contact details.

get.description: Returns outlet visits with optional filters for outlet, user and datetime range.
Campaigns / activations with linked regions and counts.

regionIds.description: Optional region cuids; activation can span multiple territories.

geofenceIds.description: Optional work area ids; rostered promoters must sign in inside one of these while the activation is current.

400.description: One or more regions or geofences not found

get.description: Sales on this activation from roster members only, with seller and line items. Optional userId, from, and to (ISO 8601) narrow results; time range is intersected with the activation window. Supervisor or admin only.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Upper bound on sale createdAt (ISO 8601), intersected with activation endsAt when set

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Lower bound on sale createdAt (ISO 8601), intersected with activation startsAt

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Restrict to this roster user (must be on the activation roster)

400.description: Invalid date or userId not on roster

get.description: Location pings for users on this activation roster. Time range defaults to the activation window; optional from/to narrow it. Optional userId must be on the roster. Supervisor or admin only.

400.description: Invalid date or userId not on roster

get.description: Returns coordinates, time, place label, staff member, and selfie as a data URL when verification was recorded. The ping must be from a roster user within the activation window.

200.description: Activation detail with products, roster, and linked work areas

regionIds.description: Replace linked regions. Omit to leave unchanged; [] clears. Values are region cuids.

geofenceIds.description: Replace linked work areas. Omit to leave unchanged; [] clears. Promoters on the roster sign in inside one of these while the activation is current.

400.description: Invalid user ids or ineligible users

409.description: One or more users already on roster

post.summary: Add multiple users to activation roster (atomic)

404.description: Activation or roster entry not found

get.description: Promoters and rostered clients see activations they are assigned to that are currently active. Supervisors and admins see all activations in their active date window.

200.description: Activation rows with linked regions and product count

get.description: Read-only. Rostered clients see sales line items recorded by field staff on this activation.

200.description: Sales rows with seller and line items

403.description: Not a client or not rostered on this activation

get.description: Read-only export: activation summary, products, and sales line items for roster field staff. Optional `from` / `to` ISO date-times are intersected with the activation window.

403.description: Not a client or not rostered on this activation
Caller is not assigned to this activation

get.description: Full detail including products for supervisor/admin; promoters and clients receive the same shape without the roster list.

403.description: Caller is not assigned to this activation

get.description: Per-field-staff roll-up for a calendar day in ATTENDANCE_TIMEZONE: first clock-in, last clock-out, missed, late (vs ATTENDANCE_EXPECTED_CHECK_IN_HHMM), and missing clock-out.

parameters.name: regionId
parameters.description: Optional region id (cuid) to restrict to one city/territory

200.description: Daily attendance rows and summary counts

get.description: Supervisors only see promoters and clients; admins see everyone. New accounts are created by invite text message; if that message cannot be sent, the new user is not saved.

post.description: Creates a sign-in account and sends instructions by text message. The account is only kept if that message is delivered successfully.

400.description: Validation error, missing SMS configuration, or SMS rejected by provider

403.description: Requires supervisor or admin; only admins may create supervisor/admin

503.description: SMS provider unreachable or HTTP error

patch.description: Partial update. Supervisors may edit promoters and clients only. Only admins may assign supervisor or admin roles.

regionId.description: Region id (cuid), or null to remove assignment

403.description: Not allowed for this role or target user

get.description: Returns the same payload as activation roster check-in detail: coordinates, time, staff, and selfie as a data URL when recorded. For promoters only; used from Live field tracking.

404.description: Ping not found or not a promoter check-in

get.description: Returns a simple health signal for uptime probes.
Returns the authenticated user's profile details.

patch.description: Updates one or more profile fields for the authenticated user.

get.description: For promoters: local-day clock-in gate (`needsDailyClockIn`) and alternating clock-in/clock-out suggestion. Non-promoters get `applicable: false`.
get.summary: Field attendance gate and segment suggestion

get.description: BACKEND_PRD §7.2 — the authenticated promoter's sales, newest first (promoters only).
Returns recent location pings for the authenticated user, newest first.

post.description: Stores a location ping with a required selfie image for attendance verification (JPEG/PNG).
Creates an outlet visit check-in and records outlet photo, stock availability, sales made, consumer engagement and visibility execution.
post.summary: Check in and execute outlet visit

get.description: Returns recent outlet visits for the authenticated field user.

post.description: BACKEND_PRD §7.4 — creates a sale with line items. Optional `Idempotency-Key` header dedupes retries per user.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID or opaque string; duplicate requests return the original sale.

201.description: Sale with line items and activation summary

403.description: Not assigned to activation or not a field role

post.description: Captures distributor name, SKU picked, quantity, cost price and pickup datetime for field inventory receipts.
Captures sold SKU, quantity, selling price and returns remaining stock balance per sold SKU.

200.description: Stock sale recorded with remaining balances

get.description: Returns opening stock, stock received, stock sold, closing balance, daily sales value and case achievement per SKU.
get.summary: Get daily inventory and sales summary

get.description: Cross-user stock rollup by SKU with per-distributor pickup analytics and daily sales value.
Returns daily achievement %, team achievement %, leaderboard, underperformer alerts and supervisor summary for trade developers.
get.summary: Get daily target monitoring for team performance
Get automated report settings and recipients

put.summary: Update automated reporting schedules and recipient list

info.title: Engaged Sales API
info.description: API documentation for Engaged Sales backend

phone.description: International (+country code) or local/national number; may start with 0. Spaces and hyphens are stripped.
Registered phone (international +… or local; may start with 0). Spaces and hyphens are stripped.

latitude.description: Device latitude (decimal degrees). For promoters: required when at least one geofence is active (send with longitude). Clients, supervisors, and admins may omit coordinates.

longitude.description: Device longitude (decimal degrees). For promoters: required with latitude when geofencing is enforced. Clients, supervisors, and admins may omit.

state.description: Signed OAuth state from start endpoint

latitude.description: Device latitude. For promoters when geofencing is active, send with longitude. Clients and supervisors/admins may omit.

longitude.description: Device longitude (pair with latitude when required for field roles).

redirectUri.description: Frontend redirect URI registered with Google OAuth

phone.description: International +… or local; may start with 0; spaces/hyphens stripped.

userId.description: Target user id whose sessions should be revoked

refreshToken.description: Refresh token to revoke the session

slug.description: Optional slug unique within the region; derived from name if omitted

userIds.description: User ids (cuid) to add. Each must be an active promoter or client, and not already on this roster.

attendanceKind.description: Attendance event type. Defaults to clock_in when omitted.

selfieImageBase64.description: Base64-encoded selfie (JPEG or PNG) for attendance verification. May be a data URL (`data:image/jpeg;base64,...`).

outletPhotoBase64.description: Optional outlet photo in base64 (raw or data URL; JPEG/PNG only).

salesMadeNotes.example: Sold 2 cartons and 6 single units during the visit.

consumerEngagementNotes.example: Engaged 9 consumers with product demo and samples.
